title: Federation of the Double Worlds
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Government |image=[[File:TalusFlag.png]] |name=Federation of the Double Worlds |type=*Republic (''de jure'')''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' *Plutocracy (''de facto'') |founding= |constitution= |headofstate= |headofgov=[[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]]{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Hagrin Zeed|Talus}} |commander= |executive= |legislative= |judicial= |military= |sector= |system= |celestialbody=*[[Talus/Legends|Talus]] *[[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] *[[Centerpoint Station]] |capital=[[Dearic/Legends|Dearic]], Talus |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] |currency=[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Galactic Credit Standard]] |religious= |holiday= |anthem= |formed= |established=c. [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]] |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *[[Five Worlds]]{{CSWECite|I|258|Fed-Dub}} *[[Confederation]] }} {{Quote|Fed-Dub?''"''
''"''Sorry. The Federation of the Double Worlds.|[[Belindi Kalenda]] and [[Jenica Sonsen]]|''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''}} The '''Federation of the Double Worlds''' (also called '''Fed-Dub''' or just simply the '''Federation''') was the government of [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]], the [[Double Worlds|Twin Worlds]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. ==Description== {{Quote|The Federation is the duly elected government of Talus and Tralus.|Belindi Kalenda|}} [[File:Talus_Tralus_EotECR.png|220px|thumb|left|The Double Worlds, Talus and Tralus]] The Federation of the Double Worlds was the elected government that ruled the [[Double Worlds]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]: the planets [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]]. Its leader held the title of [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]]. The Federation was officially a democratic republic but it had evolved over the years into a plutocracy. The government had its office in the [[Dearic Capitol|Capitol]] of [[Dearic/Legends|Dearic]], the largest city and capital of the Double Worlds. The Fed-Dub controlled a minor military force to keep the peace on the two planets.{{SonyCite|url=players/guides.vm?id=80112|text=CorSec Database A-G|int=CorSec Database A-G}} In addition, the Federation of the Double Worlds had authority over the mysterious [[Centerpoint Station]]. Located at the barycenter of Talus and Tralus, this gigantic and ancient [[Space station/Legends|space station]] had been settled like a [[habitation sphere]] and was ruled by the Fed-Dub [[Executive Secretariat]]. ==History== The Federation of the Double Worlds was formed around [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]], when the despised inhabitants of the Double Worlds declared their independence from the central authority of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] that ruled the system. Corellia responded by launching a violent [[Invasion of the Double Worlds|invasion]] of the rebellious planets. Although [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] forces were supported by troops from [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] and [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]], they failed to regain control of Talus and Tralus. The war was long and bloody but cemented the relationship between the Double Worlds. The Fed-Dub emerged victorious and became the undisputed ruler of the Double Worlds as an independent political entity. Over the next centuries, the Federation would maintain cordial, if often strained, relations with its intersystem neighbors. After the war, the Fed-Dub undertook massive building projects on Talus to improve the conditions of its citizens as well as to impress the entire system. However, the regime slowly evolved from a republic dedicated to its citizens to a corrupt plutocracy. The government endeavored to show a progressive, happy, and advanced society to both its in-system neighbors and the galaxy. [[File:FederationOfTheDoubleWorldsCaptainConstable-SWG.jpg|250px|thumb|A Fed-Dub [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and a Fed-Dub [[Constable/Legends|constable]] on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].]] During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained a presence in [[Qaestar Town]] on Talus to keep watch over the Fed-Dub. However, the underfunded Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] was to busy struggling with local criminals that ran the city to be able to properly deal with the Federation. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Diktat]] of Corellia was forced to provide elements of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] to support Imperial armed forces against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. As the war intensified, Corellian military forces were repeatedly sent away to assist the Empire, leaving the Corellian sector poorly defended. Hence, [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] exploded in the sector. On Talus, Fed-Dub's military force had to fight against many criminal and terrorist organizations, including the [[Binayre Pirates]], the [[Tralus and Talus Liberation Party]], the [[Lost Aqualish]]s and the [[Drall Patriots]].{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}} In response to the growing insecurity in the sector and to the intensification of the Galactic Civil War after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Corellian government enacted strict isolationist measures and restricted trade and traffic throughout the Corellian sector. The economy in the sector therefore declined, including on Talus and Tralus where economy relied on tourism. On the Double Worlds, the local economy and the society were destabilized by the collapse of the tourism industry and the massive arrival of impoverished migrants from other Corellian worlds. The Fed-Dub was unable to deal with the situation, leaving the government weak and unstable. At this time, [[Hagrin Zeed]] served as Prime Minister of the Federation and [[Haleen Snowline]] was the [[Minister of Protocol]].{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Haleen Snowline|Talus}} [[File:CenterpointStation-SoF.png|250px|thumb|left|[[Centerpoint Station]]]] Near the end of the Galactic Civil War, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] gained control of the Corellian sector after the fall of the Diktat of Corellia. [[Micamberlecto]], the appointed New Republic [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] of the Corellian sector, became the official ruler of the sector. Although the Governor-General theoretically oversaw all local governments of the sector, including the Fed-Dub, but in practice he barely controlled the planet Corellia. Around the same time, the [[Sacorrian Triad|Triad]] of [[Sacorria]] discovered that Centerpoint Station was in fact a colossal [[hyperspace tractor beam]] that could be used as a [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. The Sacorrian Triad therefore infiltrated the station and secretly took control of the weapons system. During the [[Corellian Crisis]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], the Triad used Centerpoint Station to destroy [[Destruction of TD-10036-EM-1271|two]] [[Destruction of Thanta Zilbra|stars]] in order to intimidate the New Republic. The first detonation decimated a large part of the residents of the station but nobody in the Corellian system, including the Fed-Dub, figure out what was really happening in Centerpoint Station. Finally, the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic navy]] [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|defeated]] the Sacorrian Triad and the Federation reclaimed Centerpoint Station.''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the New Republic seized Centerpoint Station in order to use it against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders. The Federation protested against this requisition and decided to support the extremist [[Centerpoint Party]] that advocated for the independence of the Corellian system.''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' More than a decade later, years after the end of the Yuuzhan Vong War, a new central government of the Corellian system, the [[Five Worlds]], had been established.''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' While the Fed-Dub still ruled the Double Worlds, Talus, Tralus and each of the other planets of the system voted individually to elect the [[Five World Prime Minister]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the Five Worlds and the Fed-Dub joined of the [[Confederation]] that fought the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesAED}} *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources==
